name: Effluent licence
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: EMA licence required by industrial operations discharging effluent, with quarterly waste-management reporting.

name: CZI
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: The Confederation of Zimbabwe Industries, the industrial sector's membership body.

name: BOM (bill of materials)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The recipe of materials and quantities consumed to make one unit of product.

name: OEE
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Overall equipment effectiveness: availability x performance x quality.

name: GRN (goods received note)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The receiving document confirming materials accepted into stores.

name: OTIF
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: On-time-in-full: orders delivered complete on the promised date.

name: Standard cost
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The planned unit cost against which actual production costs are compared.

name: Changeover
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Time lost converting a line between products; a key OEE loss.

name: Quarantine stock
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Stock held from use pending quality disposition.

name: Batch traceability
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Linking finished goods to input material batches for recall and quality.
